Section: Unified religion of Nuh, Ibrahim, Musa, ‘Isa, and you—uphold and don’t divide; stand firm and judge with justice; Book and Balance sent; the Hour near; believers fear it, deniers hasten it; provision by Divine wisdom
same as it was for the ones before you
